triggers.name: Mob Gating

capturePhrases.phrase: ^{S} begins to cast the gate spell\.$

triggers.comments:
Announces when a mob is gating, with the mob's name.
This message will interrupt any speech.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.comments: Announces the rampage target when a rampage message is picked up in the log.

triggers.name: Stand to cast

capturePhrases.phrase: ^You must be standing to cast a spell\.$

triggers.comments: Notifies the caster when they attempt to cast a spell while ducking.

triggers.name: Warrior at low health
triggers.comments: Notifications when a warrior goes into a berserker frenzy and needs healing.

capturePhrases.phrase: ^(?<target>.+?) has been rescued by divine intervention!$
^(?<target>You) have been rescued by divine intervention!$
^Your body screams with the power of an Avatar\.$

triggers.name: Mod Rod Ready
triggers.comments: Notifies you when a mod rod is ready to use.

triggers.name: Tell Received
triggers.comments: Tells you when you receive a new tell from another player.

triggers.name: Group Invite

capturePhrases.phrase: ^(?<player>\w+?) invites you to join a group\.$

triggers.comments: Tells you when you receive a group invite.

triggers.name: Raid Invite

capturePhrases.phrase: ^(?<player>\w+?) invites you to join a raid\.  Would you like to join\?  If you have a mercenary, it will automatically be suspended\.$

triggers.comments: Tells you when you receive a raid invite.

endEarlyPhrases.phrase: ^You are no longer A\.F\.K\. \(Away From Keyboard\)\.$

triggers.name: Guild Message
triggers.comments: Plays a notification sound when a new guild message is received.

triggers.name: AFK Check
triggers.comments: Notifies you when someone in the guild raid or group says afk check.

triggers.name: Given Loot Notification
triggers.comments:
NOTE: 
^(?:(?<count>[0-9]+?)\s)*(?<item>.+?) (?:were|was) given to you\.$
^(?<item>.+?) (?<predicate>were|was) given to (?!you)(?<recipient>.+?)\.$

triggers.name: Invis Fading
triggers.comments: Alerts the player when invis is fading.

triggers.name: Custom Timer
triggers.comments:
# Time formats are [#h #m #s]

# To create a simple timer:
/em starts a 1m 5s timer.
/em starts a 45s timer.

# To create a simple named timer:
/em starts a 26m timer for a ghoul assassin.

actions.endedSpeakPhrase: Your Journeyman Boots on ${target} has ended.
actions.endingSoonSpeakPhrase: Your Journeyman Boots on ${target} is ending soon.

triggers.name: Capture spell casting

capturePhrases.phrase: ^Your ${SpellBeingCast} spell did not take hold\. \(Blocked by (.*)\.\)

triggers.comments: This trigger will capture the spell casting of the caster and store the spell being cast into a variable for use with other triggers.
